rationale: The only resume change was the candidate's city (Berlin, DE → Bucharest, Romania), a location signal carrying no job-relevant information. Both evaluations hold the score at 5/10 and cite the same substantive gaps: no production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, no regulatory/compliance experience, and no leadership beyond 10 engineers. The wording differs slightly but the strengths, concerns, and reasoning are functionally identical, with no new concern or shifted logic tied to the location. These are reworded equivalents within ordinary run-to-run noise.
